ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the bill */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the bill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bill (e.g., Home Loan, Personal Loan EMI) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the bill */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of bill (e.g., auto, manual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bill (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill is scheduled for payment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Actual due date of the bill */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when a reminder should be sent to the user */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the bill (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the bill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the bill was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the bill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number or transaction ID for the payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., loans, credit cards) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon or image representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_categories" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "primary_category" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is the primary category for the bill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id", "category_id")
)
